name: session-orchestrator
description: Session-level orchestration for structured planning, wave execution, quality gates, and clean session close-out

interface.longDescription: Adds reusable session workflows to Codex: project analysis, wave planning, guided execution, quality gates, persistence, and clean session close-out.
defaultPrompt: Start a structured feature session for this repo
Plan a feature PRD and turn it into waves
Close the current session with verification
